programme.title: Solomon Kane
programme.desc: Captain Solomon Kane (James Purefoy) is a brutally efficient 16th Century killing machine. Armed with his signature pistols, cutlass and rapier, he and his men unleash their bloodlust as they fight for England in war after war on all continents. As the story opens, Kane and his band of pillagers are carving a bloody path through hordes of defenders in an exotic city in northern Africa. But, when Kane decides to attack a mysterious nearby castle to plunder its rumored riches, his mission takes a fateful turn. One by one, Kane's men are picked off by demonic creatures until he alone is left to face the Devil's own Reaper -- dispatched from the depths of Hell to lay claim to his hopelessly corrupt soul. Though Kane at last manages to escape, he knows that he now must redeem himself by renouncing violence and devoting himself wholly to a life of peace and purity.

programme.title: Blind

programme.title: The Recon
programme.desc: One day at early dawn, a search unit near the DMZ, the front line, is on alert. It was because a soldier from another unit's GP ran away to DMZ with a gun. Under Commander Baek, the 3rd platoon members led by First Lieutenant Cho are put into the operation to arrest the deserter. The search begins, and at the same time, First Lieutenant Lim's dead body is found at the unit's official residence. The accident is reported to the Division Headquarters and Captain Kang, who is about to be discharged, arrives at the search unit with an army surgeon. The commander and the army surgeon are rushing to conclude Lim's case with suicide, but Kang suspects that there is a deep secret in this accident. At that time, the soldiers who were put into the operations get killed one by one, and the dark truth between Lim's death and the deserter search operation is revealed.

programme.desc: A beautiful 500-year-old vampire enjoys the quiet life until her new landlord and a new guy catches her eye.

programme.title: Architecture 101
programme.desc: Seung-min designs a house for his old crush and they are whisked back to the past which stirs old memories.

programme.title: Intuition
programme.desc: Intuition takes place with workaholic relationship therapist, Dr. David Francis, who tries to help Kenny deal with his trust issues. The Doctor fails to realize his patient is having an affair with his finance Karen.

programme.title: Intuition 2
programme.desc: After a wild one-night stand, Kenny struggles to find his mysterious woman at a raunchy, underground hotel.

programme.title: Jack Squad 2: The Next Generation
programme.desc: An orphan revives her mother's criminal group 'Jack Squad' with fresh faces and updated schemes, unaware that the syndicate that killed her parents is still looking for revenge

programme.title: Kamo Lyfe
programme.desc: Friends are lost, lines are crossed, and family is formed when an all-black hiking group treks through Arizona.

programme.title: Concrete Canyons
programme.desc: In this thrilling crime drama, a sheriff searches for his son who is accused of murder and on the run from the law.

programme.title: Find Me Guilty
programme.desc: Imprisoned on a drug charge, mobster Jack DiNorscio (Vin Diesel) refuses to testify against his former associates in the Lucchesi crime family. When an ambitious prosecutor brings him back to court, he decides to defend himself. Initially regarded with disbelief, his forceful presence and knowledge of the law turn the tide of the trial.

programme.title: Life of a King
programme.desc: An ex-felon on a path of redemption defies convention and establishes a Chess Club for inner-city teenagers.

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: A former thief frantically searches for his missing daughter, who has been kidnapped and locked in the trunk of a taxi. Starring Nicolas Cage and Malin Akerman.

programme.title: The Patriot
programme.desc: A deadly virus threatens to wipe out an entire Rocky Mountain town, forcing the town doctor (Steven Seagal) to escape the soldiers who enforce the town's quarantine and devise a cure.

programme.title: King of the Avenue
programme.desc: An ambitious drug dealer sells his soul to the devil to become the city's biggest drug boss, knowing that when Satan comes to collect, he'll have to outwit a most evil force.

programme.title: Tidal Wave: No Escape
programme.desc: When brutal tidal waves suddenly destroy many coastal communities in a short period of time, John Wahl (Corbin Bernsen), a Nobel Prize winner, teams up with a Navy officer to find out the cause of the disaster.

programme.title: Streets of Blood
programme.desc: While investigating the "accidental" death of his partner, a New Orleans police officer plunges into the city's criminal underworld. Starring Val Kilmer ("The Doors") and 50 Cent.

programme.desc: The Austin City Limits Music Festival is an annual music festival that takes place at Zilker Park in Austin, Texas. The festival features more than 130 bands on eight stages for three days.

programme.title: Foo Fighters
programme.desc: With a career of over two decades and album sales over 11 million, Foo Fighters are giants in the world of contemporary rock. The roots of the band were of a much smaller scale, though, with the early musical projects of a teenage Dave Grohl. Nirvana came to a tragic end with the death of front man, Kurt Cobain. Grohl began working with the songs he had written on tour, to produce the first Foo Fighters album. With 2 Grammys, multiple albums including a best of and a new album release in 2014 there is no stopping them. Featuring archive material, music videos – “BEST OF YOU” “MONKEY WRENCH” and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists JOHN AIZLEWOOD (Evening Standard), DANIELLE PERRY (XFM), WILL HODGKINSON (The Times) & CAMILLA PIA (BBC Radio 6)

programme.title: Avril Lavigne
programme.desc: The Canadian Avril Lavigne enchanted the public in 2007 at her show in Calgary (Canada), in which she released the album “The Best Damn Thing”, which sold, that same year, more than 6 million copies worldwide. The pop singer rocked the audience to the sound of “Girlfriend” as well as other great hits like “Complicated” and “I'm With You”. DVD Tracks:01- Girlfriend02- I Can Do Better03- Sk8er Boi04- My Happy Ending05- Losing Grip06- Runaway07- Don't Tell Me08- I'm With You09- Everything Back But You10- The Best Damn Thing11- Complicated12- I Don't Have To Try13- He Wasn't14- When You're Gone15- Girlfriend ( Video clip)

programme.title: Cocinísima
programme.desc: Cocinísima - Pollo a la Cebolla: Aprendamos a preparar juntos un exquisito pollo a la cebolla. El Chef Mariano Sandoval nos enseñará paso a paso, cómo hacerlo.

programme.title: Cocinísima
programme.desc: Cocinísima - Filete Crujiente de Res con Salsa de Mostaza: Guiados por el Chef Mariano Sandoval, haremos un delicioso filete crujiente de res con salsa de mostaza. Toma nota y no pierdas ningún detalle.

programme.title: Especiales del Once
programme.desc: Especiales del Once - Luciérnagas, Chispazos de Conservación: Las luciérnagas encienden las noches en los bosques de Tlaxcala. Atraen a miles de turistas y revelan las maravillas de toda la región.

programme.title: Mi Vida
programme.desc: Mi Vida - Guy Ecker - Mi Vida: El famoso actor de origen brasileño Guy Ecker nos lleva a un recorrido por su infancia, los papeles más icónicos de su carrera, sus amores y su rol como padre.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Matilde le dice a Manuel que siempre lo amará y que está feliz porque se solucionó el problema de Adolfo. Antonia le dice a Rosario que ya está vieja y que es tiempo de dejarle el lugar a una persona más joven.

programme.title: Corazón indomable: Visita inesperada
programme.desc: Miguel aconseja a Octavio llevar a Simona a un sanatorio Maricruz se sorprende al ver llegar a Simona a su rancho, ella le sigue el juego a Simona y la invita a quedarse unos días.

programme.title: Destilando amor: Hombres enamorados
programme.desc: Daniela le dice a Gaviota que está preocupada por Rodrigo, pues sabe que sufre por ella. Alonso y Rodrigo compiten para impresionar a Gaviota.

programme.title: Teresa: Nueva vida
programme.desc: Luisa se encuentra con Lucía, una vieja amiga de la escuela. Arturo le pide a Jacinto vigile a Teresa para saber si sigue o no engañándolo. Rubén está dispuesto a todo para quitarle su hijo a Esperanza.

programme.title: Rubí
programme.desc: Rubí es una mujer tan bella como lo es de perversa y su máximo sueño es encontrar a un hombre rico y conquistarlo con su hermosura, para que la saque de la pobreza a cualquier precio.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre: Traición y amor
programme.desc: Juan le confiesa a Sofía que nunca ha dejado de amarla, pero ella ya no puede creer en él. Óscar le cuenta a Jimena todo lo relacionado con su divorcio. Fernando decide llevarse lejos a Gabriela para que sus nervios no los delaten.

programme.title: Al diablo con los guapos: Intrigas dolorosas
programme.desc: Durante una cena con Hugo y Alejandro, Florencia confiesa que vio a Mili besando a su esposo. Andrea y Karla le hacen creer a Valeria que Luciana sabe de su noviazgo con Rocky. Hugo y Alejandro vuelven a enfrentarse por el amor de Mili.

programme.title: Vino el amor: Trágica muerte
programme.desc: Fernanda cree que por fin tendrá una familia ahora que David se casará con Graciela. Por otro lado, Brian intenta defender a Marta y Carito de unos maleantes y algo malo sucede.

programme.title: María Mercedes: Futuro encuentro
programme.desc: Magnolia no deja de pensar en sus hijos y promete volver a México para encontrarlos. Meche conoce a Santiago, pero él solo se comporta de manera grosera y la echa de su casa.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Sergio se niega a creer que Angélica tuvo algo que ver con la muerte de los abuelos de Marimar. Arturo le pide a Esteban su aprobación para casarse con Gema.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Angélica busca a Bella para pedirle dinero porque su bebé necesita una costosa operación Sergio le dice al gobernador que no puede casarse con su hija.

programme.desc: Magnolia no deja de pensar en sus hijos y promete volver a México para encontrarlos. Meche conoce a Santiago, pero él solo se comporta de manera grosera y la echa de su casa.

programme.desc: Angélica busca a Bella para pedirle dinero porque su bebé necesita una costosa operación Sergio le dice al gobernador que no puede casarse con su hija.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: María idea un plan para que la policía no encarcele a Nandito. Soraya llama a la casa de María para decirle que Luis Fernando está con ella. María sufre al pensar que Luis Fernando está interesado en Soraya.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: María se declara culpable del asesinato de la madre de Soraya para salvar a Nandito.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Ezequiel le dice al almirante que el "Alacrán" era Pedro Medina, el almirante le exige que le diga la verdad a su esposa Carlota y le pide que renuncie a su cargo político. Fabiola transfiere su dinero a la cuenta de Graciela para que esté a salvo.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Adolfo y Ezequiel hacen explotar el coche del almirante Robledo. Amelia le cuenta a Fabiola la verdadera historia de Graciela.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Jose Luis corre a Rosario de la casa. Ezequiel le confiesa a Carlota que el padre Anselmo sigue vivo gracias a él. José Luis arresta a Fabiola por fraude. María se disfraza de Montserrat para meterse en la cama de José Luis.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Carlota ayuda a que Monserrat vea a Alejandro. Ezequiel le dice al padre Anselmo que Alejandro está vivo y que lo llevará con él. Fabiola le cuenta a Monserrat que Graciela es hija de una costurera y que su verdadero nombre es Gaudencia Jiménez.

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Teresa le dice a Mariano que también lo ama y que reconsiderará volver con él. Teresa y Fernando se conocen durante su viaje a Cancún. Aurora le dice a Mariano que Teresa se fue de viaje con Arturo y no sola como le había hecho creer.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Ezequiel le dice al almirante que el "Alacrán" era Pedro Medina, el almirante le exige que le diga la verdad a su esposa Carlota y le pide que renuncie a su cargo político. Fabiola transfiere su dinero a la cuenta de Graciela para que esté a salvo.

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Teresa continúa su venganza contra Aída y no pierde oportunidad para hacerla sentir menos. Fernando presenta a Luisa como su novia. Mariano sigue creyendo que Teresa aún lo quiere y la besa. Aurora los encuentra.

programme.title: Imperio de mentiras: Unión y separación
programme.desc: Elisa decide decirle a Leonardo que lo mejor es separarse y no seguir con su amor. Darío le pide a Victoria que se convierta en su aliada. Majo descubre la traición de Clara.

programme.title: La Gata: Fuerte amenaza
programme.desc: Rita echa a Esmeralda de su casa tras golpear a Inés. Esmeralda pasa la noche en la calle y le pide a Rita que la deje regresar. Además, el "italiano" amenaza a Pablo con una pistola y le dice que se aleje de la Gata.

programme.title: La que no podía amar: Convencimiento
programme.desc: Cynthia enfurece al saber que Gustavo sigue enamorado de Ana Paula. Macaria entristece al saber que Ulises está cada vez menos interesado en recuperar su matrimonio. Rosaura le ruega a Bruno que convenza a Rogelio que busque a Ana Paula.

programme.title: Sortilegio: Celos
programme.desc: Bruno le propone a Katia que se vean en un hotel. Alex comienza a sospechar de Meche. Fernando siente celos al ver a Victoria con Hernán.

programme.title: Abismo de pasión: Visita en la cárcel
programme.desc: Gael se preocupa al saber que su madre está desaparecida. Sabrina visita a Paolo en la cárcel y él le confiesa que Florencia no está embarazada.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña: Fuertes sospechas
programme.desc: Rosendo intenta matar a José Miguel. Leonor descubre que Rosendo es el verdadero asesino de su padre. José Miguel sospecha que Leonor es la responsable de que Rosendo comprara sus terrenos.

programme.title: La usurpadora: Verdad revelada
programme.desc: Paulina le cuenta a Donato que es una usurpadora y le pide que no la le traiga más problemas con los Bracho. Piedad hará lo que sea para evitar que Carlos Daniel se divorcie de Paola.

programme.title: El manantial: El accidente
programme.desc: Alejandro encuentra el automóvil del padre Salvador y lo salva. Alfonsina va tras Alejandro y Margarita.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido: Reportero borracho
programme.desc: El patrón le dice a Cipriano que un reportero va a ir al hotel. Anita cree que el reportero está muerto y un investigador va al hotel, cuando descubren que el reportero no murió, el investigador lo arresta por cometer muchas infracciones.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Albertano es estafado por una mujer que promete volverlo un famoso cantante, pero durante su presentación todos descubren la farsa de su voz.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Albertano y Vítor conocen a dos mujeres que les hacen creer que están interesadas en ellos, pero solo quieren su dinero.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: La euforia por el feng shui y por limpiar desata un conflicto entre familias. Doña Lucha y María intentan controlar a todos con el feng shui, y organizan un concurso.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: En su búsqueda por trabajo, Albertano es contratado por María de todos los Ángeles pero sucede una tragedia que Rosa Aurora tendrá que arreglar.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Doña Chivis aumenta la renta del departamento, y la Nena empieza a vender tartas caseras para poder pagarla. El administrador descubre el agujero que conecta la casa de los López con la del vecino y avisa a la propietaria legítima.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.sub-title: Entre el bote y el agujero
programme.desc: Plácido está en la cárcel y Pierre trata de abonar la fianza, pero queda libre Jacinta. Los López tratan de tapar el agujero porque, si no lo hacen, se irán a la calle.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica y Ludovico creen que Ludoviquito tendrá su primera relación sexual. A lo que al final era el cumpleaños de la sobrina de don Camerino.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludoviquito accede a una apuesta con un compañero de la escuela para una carrera de perros el que pierda correrá en ropa interior con su familia.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Paco acompaña a Fran a la boda de Karime y se encuentra con Emilia, una exalumna que reprobó en la universidad.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Paco es despedido de la universidad por el escándalo que se generó por Emilia y todas sus mujeres le reclaman.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Los vecinos reciben una invitación de la delegación para separar la basura como orgánica e inorgánica y Germán es el encargado de dicha misión. Alejandra descubre que un niño de la escuela molesta a Morris.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Magdalena abre una cuenta en Facebook donde presume demasiadas cosas e inclusive transmite en vivo una invitación pública para la fiesta de su nieto Morris.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: La euforia por el feng shui y por limpiar desata un conflicto entre familias. Doña Lucha y María intentan controlar a todos con el feng shui, y organizan un concurso.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: El profesor Reverte lleva a Roberta a conocer niños de la calle y así aprenda a valorar lo que tienen en la vida. Alma le reclama a Reverte por haberse llevado a Roberta sin permiso. Iñaki se vuelve el técnico de RBD.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Celina le asegura a Mia que Sol es una buena persona. León lleva a cabo sus planes para lograr que Diego abandone la banda. Alma descubre que Octavio tiene un hermano gemelo.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Diego convoca a sus compañeras para que hagan pruebas y así encontrar a las suplentes de Roberta y Lupita, debido a que ellas decidieron dejar el grupo.

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Michael Chiarello's Napa
programme.desc: Three new ideas from a simple pot of rice. We'll set up a risotto bar with lots of creative toppings, make a warm vanilla-flavored Rice Pudding with summer fruit, and mix a beautiful Insalata di Riso with asparagus, fava beans, peas, lemon, ham and herbs. Then we'll see the wine country from the Napa Valley Wine Train.

programme.title: Michael Chiarello's Napa
programme.desc: Simple dishes show off the flavor of new peas and asparagus. We'll make a Cheater's Chicken Stock (when there's no homemade stock on hand), a bright green Spring Pea Soup, a quick, tender and lemony Peas and Cipolline dish, and Halibut with Asparagus and Salsa Genovese. We'll see the vineyards of the wine country covered in golden mustard blossoms, and drop in on the Mustard Festival.

programme.title: Michael Chiarello's Napa
programme.desc: Foods that warm the heart and soothe the soul. A ten-minute technique for making olives bright and lively, homemade mozzarella, which we serve en carrozza – in a "carriage" of bread dipped in egg and anchovies – and turkey polpettone filled with a center of melting cheese. We'll learn the stories behind the valley's scenic, historic stone walls.

programme.title: Michael Chiarello's Napa
programme.desc: Discover a lemon marinade and other secrets for preparing artichoke hearts. We'll sear a sea bass and make an artichoke salad with red onions, kalamata olives, lemons, and other Mediterranean flavors. We'll cook baby lamb chops and artichokes and serve them with a creamy, tangy egg-lemon sauce. And we'll cross the hill to see the other food and wine-loving valley, Sonoma.

programme.title: Michael Chiarello's Napa
programme.desc: Soup makes a meal and, with a few techniques, becomes a sauce the next day for fish, poultry or meat. Summer Corn Soup, served warm or cold, makes a beautiful yellow sauce for scallops. Tart apples and sweet butternut squash make a soup that becomes a full-bodied sauce for pork chops. We'll visit a ghost winery and meet some third-generation California winemakers.

programme.title: Michael Chiarello's Napa
programme.desc: Our favorite pantry secret stays in your freezer. Compound butters are flavored with fresh herbs and spices, rolled into logs, and kept cold to retain all their flavor. We'll make a Garlic Thyme Butter, a Basil Chive Butter for steak, bruschetta or corn, and a Bagna Cauda Butter for fresh clams and pasta. And we'll visit some of the architectural gems of the Napa Valley.

programme.title: Michael Chiarello's Napa
programme.desc: A real farmer's breakfast with potato hash, eggs, and Damn Hot Peppers. We'll finish with Verbena Coffee and a refreshing honey zabaglione that you can make ahead and chill or serve warm. We'll drop in on Michael's hometown of Turlock, California.

programme.title: Michael Chiarello's Napa
programme.desc: Don't toss that stale bread! Breadcrumbs transform goat cheese into a warm, flavorful salad and make Veal Milanese golden brown, crispy, and fork tender. We'll visit some happy goats to see why Sonoma goat cheese is some of the world's best.

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E04
programme.desc: In this episode, we arrive in Sydney by departing into the Ken Done realm of artistry. Set a spin, we then roam the regions of Coffs Harbour and Urunga! Partaking in a happiness revolution in the shape of a grocery store (The Happy Frog) to paddle-boarding with direct descendants of the world's first stand up paddlers down a historical stream- this episode highlights the aim of being open to diversity in epic forms!

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E05
programme.desc: In this episode, we "hang" with some friends abseiling over Southbank Parklands! Then we gather our courage and ascend the Story Bridge. Next, we mount some horses and find ourselves prospecting for gemstones at Thunderbird Park. Finally, we pull over and unwind in koala territory up on Mount Tambourine.

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E06
programme.desc: In this episode, we discover where Australia begins by embarking down the Mulgrave River on an exclusive day tour out to the Frankland Islands. Next, we explore a bit of cultural history by spearfishing alongside the Daintree Rainforest. Then we go full eco-touristic while visiting a revered sanctuary of wildlife, Hartley's Crocodile Adventure! Ultimately, we arrive at Fitzroy Island Retreat. Enough said!

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E07
programme.desc: In this episode, we pursue the spirit of ambition while discovering Hawaii's immortal culture! From walking the hallowed grounds of Hilo Coffee Mill to witnessing the reinvention of traditions at Old Lahaina Luau- this episode represents the best of what is to be expected while traveling wide-eyed through paradise!

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E08
programme.desc: In this episode, we visit The Island of Hawaii better known as “The Big Island.” Here, we explore the history and geography of the islands, learn how to Hula Dance, visit a tranquil secluded retreat, learn the art of lei-making, and have some sea and land adventures!

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E09
programme.desc: In this episode, we explore the taste of pacific cuisine. From Hawaiian fusion and the beloved coffee bean to New Zealand oysters and tropical fish, Didiayer shares a variety of tastes around the pacific rim.

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E10
programme.desc: In this episode, we explore culture old and new through a variety of unique destinations. Whether it be doing the Haka with a Maori tribe, weaving alpaca hair, or getting the real story behind the Hawaiian Luau, this episode dives in to the customs that bring people together.

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E11
programme.desc: In this episode, we step out and in to nature to explore what adventure awaits. Amongst rappelling, zip-lining, horseback riding, snorkeling with dolphins and feeding crocodiles there is hardly a moment to catch your breath!

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E12
programme.desc: In this episode, we share some of the best places from our journey where we chose to rest our heads. High-class or just like home, these lovely accommodations are sure to fit anyone's budget and style.

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E13
programme.desc: In this episode, we revisit this season's best moments in art, cuisine, culture, and adventure. These are cherished memories we hope will inspire you to head out and find your wanderlust.

programme.title: Wildest Places S01 E01
programme.desc: The calm azure waters of the Coral Triangle are fringed with jungle, coconut trees and mangroves. Centuries of seismic activity have lined these bays with volcanic ash and mud. programme.desc: The team wonders what's up with Sonia as she wrestles with Lou's big secret. programme.title: The New Boss

programme.title: Hayseed Inferno

programme.title: Bullseye!
programme.desc: Sonia, the new boss, is still struggling to keep the team in line, but when tragedy strikes on a routine repossession, her reign at the top faces its biggest challenge yet. Matt and Froy hit the club to take a sports car away from a deadbeat DJ.

programme.title: Phi Alpha Fail
programme.desc: Carlos goes undercover at a frat house, but when the party gets the best of him Sonia has to step in and fight the drunken mob. And when Matt and Ronnie go after some wanna-be internet sensations, they become the RO's ticket to fame in a violent potato launcher attack bound to go viral.

programme.title: Boys with Toys
programme.desc: Matt is eager to work his way onto Sonia's coveted airplane repo, despite her adamancy against him.

programme.title: Mile High Mayhem
programme.desc: On this special season finale of Operation Repo, the team gears up for a mile high repo of a lifetime! Froy and Sonia repo a water blob from a lake house, but the RO and his friends refuse to let this deflate their party. And with Sonia's hands tied, she is forced to offer Matt a position on the airplane. The team takes to the skies, but when plans go awry will Matt make the ultimate sacrifice for the team? Or will his ego force everything to spiral violently out of control?

programme.title: Reclaim the Plane
programme.desc: In the premiere of the final season of Operation Repo, the team must recover an airplane and return one-hundred thousand dollars. But after two members of the team bail when it's time to save the company, will the others be able to bounce back in time to avoid a jail sentence?

programme.title: First Rule of Repo
programme.desc: Froy and Sonia encounter a city employee who tries to give them the boot, and a mechanic's shady scheme comes crashing down on Matt and Ronnie. But with Froy still in debt to Sonia, an RO's offer to make a quick buck convinces Froy to break the first rule of repo.

programme.title: Natural Liar
programme.desc: First, Froy and Ronnie dodge tomatoes and pesticide when an organic farmer won't give up his tractor, and when they are in the clear, Froy confronts Ronnie about telling Sonia about the boob purchase and inadvertently reveals the Lambo repo. Next, Carlos and Matt get an offer of stardom from a slick Hollywood agent. And finally, Sonia drags more information from Ronnie and doesn't understand why everyone's going behind her back with Froy's big Lambo repo. Plus, they lose control of a Chevy Impala while repoing from a mace wielding shopper.

programme.title: The Froylan Job
programme.desc: A hoarder with a secret tries to pull a fast one on Matt and Froy, and Sonia takes sides in a dramatic lover's quarrel. Froy finally gets a shot at recovering the Lamborghini, but will his ingenious plan come crashing down around him?

programme.title: Tricks and Treats
programme.desc: First, a mischievous magician gets Ronnie and Carlos to stick together when they interrupt his show to grab his car. Next, Froy and Ronnie have to put hands on a seriously stupid sugar daddy and the recently upgraded debtor's chest when they repo from a stripper who will do anything to keep her car. And finally, Matt and Carlos go head to head against a boxing manager and his fight fixing fighter.

programme.title: Now Serving Mrs. Pizarro
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy discuss what they will do with their severance pay once the company is sold, but have to put discussion on hold while they repo repo a hovercraft golf cart from a snooty golfer. Next, Sonia and Ronnie's easy day at the salon gets disastrous when the should-be debtor serves Sonia with a lawsuit. And finally, Froy and Carlos head out to a worksite to repo the bulldozer that Carlos should have been training for.

programme.title: Taken for a Ride
programme.desc: A professional stunt driver slips through Froy and Sonia's grasp, sending them on a violent high speed chase. Matt offends a pretty RO who seeks womanly revenge, and Froy and Carlos go undercover at a lowrider show. And when Sonia announces a dangerous plan to save the company from the lawsuit, the team must decide whether they're willing to risk it all.

programme.sub-title: Topher Grace, HGTV Stars Mike Jackson & Egypt Sherrod, Drew's News

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Barefoot Contessa Ina Garten joins Drew for the entire show! Ina shares with Drew her disastrous first date with husband of 54 -years Jeffrey, his love notes and some of his text messages going astray! Ina joins Drew and actress and author of "My First Popsicle" Zosia Mamet in the kitchen to whip up Scrambled Eggs Cacio e Pepe from her new book "Go To Dinners." Plus, Drew has a big surprise for Ina you won't want to miss!

programme.sub-title: Alicia Silverstone,Cookbook Club with Molly Yeh& Pilar, Drew's News: “Scream” Edition with Danny Pellegrino

Plus, Drew and Alicia are joined by dating expert Damona Hoffman, who educates them on red flags as they both navigate the world of online dating. Then, Drew continues her Cookbook Countdown, in advance of the release of her first cookbook “Rebel Homemaker,” and is joined by Molly Yeh to Pilar Valdes to whip up tasty Italian dishes. Plus, it's a very special Drew's News: “Scream” Edition with Danny Pellegrino.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Katherine Heigl, Drew's News with Katherine Heigl

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.desc: Drew kicks off season two at the Paramount Lot in Los Angeles with, "The Morning Show"‚ star Jennifer Aniston. Plus, "Let's Make A Deal"‚ host Wayne Brady stops by putting Drew and Jennifer's game skills to the test as they play to raise funds for Wagmor Pets Dog Rescue. Then, in an all new Drew-Gooder, Drew shines a spotlight on Dolores Sheen, a.k.a. Aunt Dolores, who has spent the last 50 years educating children from underserved communities in Los Angeles. Plus, Drew is celebrating hometown pride all week long with viewers sharing tours of what makes their town so special and unique including today's hometown spirit tour of Boston.

programme.title: Blackfish
programme.desc: Killer whales are beloved, majestic, friendly giants, yet infamous for their capacity to kill viciously. BLACKFISH unravels the complexities of this dichotomy, employing the story of the notorious performing whale Tilikum, who — unlike any orca in the wild — has taken the lives of several people while in captivity. BLACKFISH expands on the discussion of keeping such intelligent creatures in captivity. Directed by Gabriela Cowperthwaite.

programme.title: The Wolfpack
programme.desc: THE WOLFPACK is a coming of age story following the six Angulo brothers who have spent their entire lives locked away from society in an apartment on the Lower East Side of Manhattan. All they know of the outside world is gleaned from the films they watch obsessively and recreate meticulously, using elaborate homemade props and costumes. For years this has served as a productive way to stave off loneliness – but when one of the brothers escapes, everything changes. Directed by Crystal Moselle.

programme.title: Wildfire
programme.desc: Nicola is a natural winemaker living in a remote village near Crotone, where his atavistic pursuit of wine is under active siege from climate related wildfires and the prolonged dry seasons. For Nicola, and other winemakers like him, this environmental change has existential consequences it threatens his livelihood. “Wildfire” patiently observes Nicola in this affective state of anxiety—as the wildfire grows within him—as he's forced to alter the course of his harvest in real time. Directed by Andree Ljutica.

programme.title: After Skid Row
programme.desc: After Skid Row documents the journey of Barbie Carter as she navigates the transition to housed life following the brutal reality of a decade on the streets. Her unique story and compelling character help to both demystify and deeply personalize a homelessness epidemic that continues to swell across Los Angeles. Directed by Lindsey Hagen.

programme.title: Bloody Nose, Empty Pockets
programme.desc: On the eve of the 2016 U.S. presidential election, and on its final night before closing, a Las Vegas dive bar becomes a stage where its employees and barflies commiserate one last time. Directed by filmmaking brothers Bill and Turner Ross.

programme.title: Oscar Nominated "Ninety-five Senses"
programme.desc: Narrated by Tim Blake Nelson, this is an ode to the body's five senses delivered by a man with little time left to enjoy them. An Oscar nominated DOCUMENTARY+ Original. Directed by Jared and Jerusha Hess.

45365 explores the congruities of daily life in an American town. From the patrol car to the courtroom, the playground to the nursing home, the parade to the prayer service, it explores relationships and interactions - with people and their environment. The stories of a father and son, a young relationship, cops and criminals, officials and their electorate coalesce into a mosaic of faces, places, and events. 45365 is a portrait of a city and its people. Directed by Turner Ross and Bill Ross IV.

programme.title: Deltas of the World
programme.desc: Hardly any other area is as unspoiled as the Yukon Delta in western Alaska. This fascinating network of swamps and river arms looks like a landscape at the beginning of mankind. Only 25,000 people live in this barren region, which is almost as big as Greece. Most of these inhabitants are indigenous and belong to the ethnic group of the Yupik. They make their living on the steep banks of the Yukon River. And in their villages, built on piles to protect them against flooding, you can see the effects of climate changes on nature - and on the community life of the indigenous population. On the trail of the national fish of Alaska, the salmon, the film follows the Yukon River and follows moose hunters, migratory birds and scientists who do research in the delta.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.sub-title: Heli Platform to Platform Jump, Barber Shop, Container Launch
programme.desc: This episode features four co-ed pairs competing as teams. In the first stunt, both team members leap back and forth between two platforms hanging from helicopters with each person transferring up to 10 flags from one platform to the other and then jumping in the water. The three teams to get highest flag total will advance to the next round. In the second stunt one team member is seated in a barber chair and their partner spins them. When the chair stops, they have to get whichever haircut their head was pointing to. There are six haircuts they can get. Teams would advance to the finals if both members got their designated haircuts. In the finale a crane lifts a large container to 200 feet in the air, both team members have to climb rope ladders hanging from the container. Once they reach the container, they both have to scale a narrow ledge on the side, collect two Allen wrenches, and climb another ladder to the top. Once on top, they have to use the wrenches to unscrew hatches and climb down into the container. When they were both inside, they have to touch two pieces of a live wire together in order to blow themselves out of the container and into the water below. The team to complete this stunt the fastest would be the Fear Factor Champions at winning $50,000. This week competing in the Home Invasion is the Frederickson family of Hagerstown, Maryland.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard's feud reaches a boiling point after Jungle Grrrl makes it personal. The Fabulous, Lana Star sets the record straight against allegations and brings a surprising new client to WOW. A vicious hallway attack changes the course of the Tag Team division. And a new competitor from the toxic underground makes her WOW debut. The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard's feud reaches a boiling point after Jungle Grrrl makes it personal. The Fabulous, Lana Star sets the record straight against allegations and brings a surprising new client to WOW. A vicious hallway attack changes the course of the Tag Team division. And a new competitor from the toxic underground makes her WOW debut.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: The personalities and conflict have been brewing for weeks, making anything possible in tonight's Six Women Tag Team Match Main Event with no time limit. The Beast puts her WOW World Championship on the line by announcing an open challenge to the entire WOW roster. And Stephy Slays seeks retribution against the aggressor of her tag team partner Keta Rush's brutal attack.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: Fans go wild as new WOW Superhero from the beaches of California, Cali Ray makes her debut. The self proclaimed “Grits N Glam” duo Jessie Jones and Amber O'Neal secure a rematch against the team they believe cost them the gold. The Beast gets more than she bargained for while defending her title against The Temptress. Tensions rise between The Fabulous Lana Star and her prodigy The Lioness. And the WOW World Championship Titles are on the line as a newly formed dynamic team takes their shot at the champs, Fire and Adrenaline.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard has her aim set on The Beast, but firing her attorney, Sophia Lopez, creates unexpected obstacles between her and her target. The Disciplinarian and Samantha Smart aim to take away the sunshine from new WOW competitor, Cali Ray. The relationship between Jessie Jones and Amber O'Neal is tested. And The Psycho Sisters, Razor and Fury accompanied by Mezmeriah continue down their unpredictable path of destruction towards the WOW Tag Team Championship Titles.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard discovers hidden terms in her legal contract with the World's Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez. Ms. Lopez is seemingly playing a final hand by forcing a legally bound Tessa Blanchard into a match against a deadly mystery opponent. Adrenaline appears critically injured from being jumped by Exile and as such, her WOW World Tag Team Champion partner Fire is taking a stand. But it turns out the scorned Exile members aren't the only WOW Superheroes willing to deceive and harm the champs in pursuit of the tag team championship titles. Impressive newcomer and barrel riding champ, Casey Dakota makes her in ring debut. And the long history of battles that have ensued between The Psycho Sisters and The Dark Side members: Holidead, Siren, and the possessed Princess Aussie culminate into an all out war, resulting in the most shocking act that has ever taken place in WOW.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: Tonight has “feud” written all over it with two of The Fabulous Lana Star's past prodigies joining forces to teach Lana and her newest prodigy a lesson. Will the ghosts of Lana's past haunt her in the ring forever or does she have a plan to prevail? Tessa Blanchard's shocking disqualification from last week's battle with Venomous costs her much desired championship rematch against The Beast. The Dixie Darlings make a peace offering to Jessie Jones. And Stephy Slays bravely takes up for her friend against The Temptress and The Dagger who attacked Keta Rush in the alley.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: Will the spirit of The Lioness be killed by last week's attack or will she demonstrate the resolve to continue? Jessie Jones uses the Dixie Darlings and a tactical argument to secure a shot at the WOW Tag Team Championship Titles. The events between The Psycho Sisters and The Dark Side: Holidead, Siren, and Princess Aussie have been escalating for weeks. Fury and Mezmeriah take to the ring to defend Razor after Siren set fire to her face in an unsanctioned brawl. And an unexpected competitor wants to join The Psycho Sisters.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: With Keta Rush injured, can Stephy Slays find a new partner to help end Exile's reign of brutality? The Psycho Sister's leader Razor was taken out by a vicious and fiery attack last week. WOW veteran Spike joins forces to help even the odds against Holidead, Siren, and Princess Aussie. The Lioness returns to the ring for the first time since suffering humiliation and betrayal at the hands of Lana Star and Team Blondage. Former WOW World Champion, Tessa Blanchard is hungrier than ever for her shot at The Beast, but she must first claim victory in tonight's Number One Contender match against a treacherous competitor.

programme.title: Project Runway

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The Season 14 designers and Tim come together to take care of unfinished business and settle some scores. And on this reunion, even Tim Gunn has an issue that he wants settled!

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: In this season's casting special, "Road to the Runway," sixteen new designers will be introduced with a behind-the-scenes look from their casting auditions home visits, casting submissions, and sit down interviews. Tim Gunn will present the designers in carefully carved out categories that will lead you into the season premiere.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Kicking off the season with an Unconventional Materials Challenge, Heidi and Tim welcome the designers at a Season 15 launch party. The designers are shocked to learn that the decor for the party will also serve as their materials for their looks. Savannah Guthrie joins the judging panel.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers must create an outfit to flatter all body types, and the challenge proves to be more difficult for some than others. Guest judge Nina Dobrev joins.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers have to create a look that sparkles not only in daylight, but also under blacklights on the Runway. Anxieties rise when the unusual materials leave many of the designers in the dark. Jamie King joins the judges this week.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: In the Heidi Klum Swimwear Challenge, the designers create their own fabric to use in crafting a stylish swimsuit. The winner will have their design sold as part of Heidi's swimwear line! But the contestants lack of swimsuit experience makes for a harder challenge than expected.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: In the season's first Team Challenge, the designers exercise their business savvy when they pitch their collection ideas to raise money from a group of mystery investors. The stakes are raised when they learn that the winning team members will each receive $5,000, and the winner will be featured in Marie Claire magazine!
